data.text/markdown:
Geometric Algebra — Symbolic Expressions

This notebook demonstrates the symbolic layer of the ga library.
Setup — 3D Euclidean Algebra

data.text/html: ||(a b||)
||(a \wedge b||)
||(a \;\lrcorner\; b||)
||(a \;\llcorner\; b||)
||(A \cdot B||)
||(A * B||)

data.text/markdown: Sandwich Product & Grade Projection

data.text/html: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||)

data.text/markdown: Evaluating: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||) = -e₁ - 2e₂
Unary Operations

data.text/html: ||(\tilde{R}||)
||(v^\dagger||)
||(\bar{v}||)

data.text/markdown: Dual, Norm, Unit, Inverse

data.text/html: ||(v^*||)
||(v^{*^{-1}}||)
||(\lVert v \rVert||)
||(\hat{v}||)
||(v^{-1}||)

data.text/markdown: Even / Odd Grades, Squared

data.text/html: ||(\langle A \rangle_{\text{even}}||)
||(\langle v \rangle_{\text{odd}}||)
||(R^2||)

data.text/markdown: Arithmetic & Operator Sugar

data.text/html: ||(a + b||)
||(a - b||)
||(3 a||)
||(\left(a + b\right) R||)

data.text/markdown: Evaluating Expressions

data.text/html: Wedge: ||(a \wedge b||) = e₁₂Norm: ||(\lVert v \rVert||) = 2.23606797749979Inverse: ||(a^{-1}||) = e₁Sandwich: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||) = -e₁ - 2e₂

data.text/markdown: Rotation Demo

data.text/html: Rotate ||(v = e_1||) by ||(90°||) in the ||(e_1 e_2||) plane:||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||)Result: e₂

data.text/markdown:
LaTeX Output

Every expression has .latex() for raw LaTeX and .latex(wrap='$') for inline math.

data.text/html: .latex() → \langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}.latex(wrap='$') → ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||)

Interactive Rotor

Drag the slider to rotate ||(e_1||) in the ||(e_1 e_2||) plane.
